content_body: This cabin was perfect, everything we needed and more. Extremely clean! It was not to far off the main road and the drive out to the cabin was not bad at all even though it was not a paved road. We will come back to this cabin. The rental company was great, had one small issue and they came right out and fixed it!!! We have stayed in several cabins in this area and used several different rental companies, this one is by far the best in my opinion!
title: Everything We Needed and More!
